appName.description: Extension display name shown in chrome://extensions and the Chrome Web Store.

appDescription.message: AI-powered job applications and B2B sales outreach. Generates tailored CVs, cover letters, and cold emails; auto-fills application forms.
appDescription.description: Short description shown in chrome://extensions and the Chrome Web Store.

header_agentLabel.description: Label for the agent switcher in the popup header.

header_signOut.description: Sign-out action in the popup header.

userMenu_resumeCv.description: Menu item that opens the resume and CV editor.

userMenu_settings.description: Menu item that opens the agent settings page.

userMenu_dashboard.description: Menu item that opens the agent dashboard.

userMenu_logout.description: Menu item that signs the user out.

userMenu_usage.description: Section heading for credit usage inside the user menu.

userMenu_creditsLabel.description: Shows how many credits the user has.

userMenu_tierByoEnabled.description: Label shown when BYO key is active.

userMenu_topUpPrompt.description: Prompt text inviting the user to request more credits.

userMenu_topUpSubject.description: Email subject for a credit top-up request.

userMenu_topUpBody.message:
Hi,

I'd like to request additional credits for my account.

User id: $userId$

Thanks
userMenu_topUpBody.description: Email body for a credit top-up request.

credits_remaining.description: Displays the number of credits remaining.

credits_loading.description: Shown while credit balance is being fetched.

credits_unavailable.description: Shown when the credit balance cannot be fetched.

footer_version.description: Extension version number shown in the popup footer.

sessionList_title.description: Title of the recent sessions panel.

sessionList_viewAll.description: Link to view all sessions in the dashboard.

sessionList_empty.description: Empty state message when there are no sessions.

sessionList_loading.description: Shown while the session list is being fetched.

agentSwitcher_label.description: Screen-reader label for the agent switcher dropdown.

sessionList_errorPrefix.description: Prefix shown when the session list fails to load.

theme_label.description: Section heading for the theme selector in the user menu.

theme_light.description: Light theme option in the theme selector.

theme_dark.description: Dark theme option in the theme selector.

theme_system.description: System theme option that follows the OS preference.
